name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ /\ state[i] = "idle"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
    \/ /\ state[i] = "trying"
       /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
    \/ /\ state[i] = "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state>>

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in 1..10

VARIABLES participants, coordinator

TypeOK ==
    /\ participants \in [1..N -> {"idle", "prepared", "aborted", "committed"}]
    /\ coordinator \in {"idle", "preparing", "committing", "aborting"}

Init ==
    /\ participants = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
    /\ coordinator = "idle"

Prepare ==
    /\ coordinator = "preparing"
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: participants[i] = "prepared"

Commit ==
    /\ coordinator = "committing"
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: participants[i] = "committed"

Abort ==
    /\ coordinator = "aborting"
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: participants[i] = "aborted"

Next ==
    \/ /\ coordinator = "idle"
       /\ coordinator' = "preparing"
       /\ participants' = participants
    \/ /\ coordinator = "preparing"
       /\ Prepare
       /\ coordinator' = "committing"
       /\ participants' = participants
    \/ /\ coordinator = "committing"
       /\ Commit
       /\ coordinator' = "idle"
       /\ participants' = participants
    \/ /\ coordinator = "idle"
       /\ coordinator' = "aborting"
       /\ participants' = participants
    \/ /\ coordinator = "aborting"
       /\ Abort
       /\ coordinator' = "idle"
       /\ participants' = participants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* forks[i] = 0 if free, 1 if held by philosopher i *)
TypeOK == forks \in {0,1}^N /\ state \in {"thinking","hungry","eating"}^N

Init == forks = <<0: i \in 0..N-1>> /\ state = <<"thinking": i \in 0..N-1>>

left(i) == (i - 1) % N
right(i) == (i + 1) % N

hungry(i) == state[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[i] = 0 /\ forks[right(i)] = 0
eating(i) == state[i] = "eating" /\ forks[i] = 1 /\ forks[right(i)] = 1

TakeForks(i) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 1, ![right(i)] = 1] /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
PutForks(i) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![right(i)] = 0] /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Next == \E i \in 0..N-1:
          (hungry(i) /\ TakeForks(i)) \/ (eating(i) /\ PutForks(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
VARIABLES flag, num


(* Type constraints *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> 1..N]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

(* Initial state: all processes have number 1 and are not choosing *)
Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 1]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Helper: maximum number currently held by any process *)
maxNum == Max(Seq(num))

(* Process i chooses a number *)
Choose(i) ==
  /\ flag[i] = FALSE
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = maxNum + 1]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<num>>

(* Process i leaves the bakery *)
Leave(i) ==
  /\ flag[i] = TRUE
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<flag>>

(* Process i enters critical section *)
Enter(i) ==
  /\ flag[i] = TRUE
  /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

(* Process i exits critical section *)
Exit(i) ==
  /\ flag[i] = TRUE
  /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

(* Next-state relation: any process can choose, enter, exit, or leave *)
Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N:
    Choose(i) \/ Enter(i) \/ Exit(i) \/ Leave(i)

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(0..K)
    /\ head \in 0..K
    /\ tail \in 0..K
    /\ size \in 0..K

Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 0
    /\ tail = 0
    /\ size = 0

Producer == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  \* Enqueue 1
    /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % (K + 1)
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ head' = head

Consumer == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)  \* Dequeue
    /\ head' = (head + 1) % (K + 1)
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ tail' = tail

Next == 
    \/ Producer
    \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Majority
VARIABLES currentTerm, state, votedFor


TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in 0..N
          /\ votedFor \in 0..N \/ {None}
          /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = "Follower"

RequestVote == /\ state = "Candidate"
              /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
              /\ votedFor' = self
              /\ state' = "Follower"

VoteGranted == /\ state = "Follower"
              /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
              /\ votedFor' = self
              /\ state' = "Candidate"

Next == \/ RequestVote
        \/ VoteGranted

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

TypeOK == readers \in 0..N /\ writer_active \in {TRUE, FALSE}

Init == readers = 0 /\ writer_active = FALSE

ReadStart == /\ readers < N
              /\ readers' = readers + 1
              /\ writer_active' = writer_active

ReadEnd == /\ readers > 0
            /\ readers' = readers - 1
            /\ writer_active' = writer_active

WriteStart == /\ readers = 0
               /\ writer_active = FALSE
               /\ writer_active' = TRUE
               /\ readers' = readers

WriteEnd == /\ writer_active = TRUE
             /\ writer_active' = FALSE
             /\ readers' = readers

Next == \E action \in {ReadStart, ReadEnd, WriteStart, WriteEnd} : action

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES channel, marker, state

ASSUME N \in 1..10

CHANNELS == {1..N} \ {1} \cup {1..N} \ {N}
vars == <<state, channel, marker>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "recording", "recorded"}]
          /\ channel \in [CHANNELS -> Seq(Nat)]
          /\ marker \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ channel = [c \in CHANNELS |-> <<>>]
        /\ marker = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \/ /\ state[1] = "idle"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![1] = "recording"]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<channel, marker>>
        \/ /\ state[i] = "recording"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "recorded"]
          /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT !i..j = Append(channeli..j, i)]
          /\ marker' = [marker EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
        \/ /\ state[i] = "recorded"
          /\ state' = state
          /\ channel' = channel
          /\ marker' = marker

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES token, msg

TypeOK == /\ token \in 1..N
          /\ msg \in {"idle", "sent"}

Init == /\ token = 1
        /\ msg = "idle"

Next == 
    /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
    /\ msg' = IF token = N THEN "sent" ELSE "idle"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, msg>>

====

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLES store

vars == <<store>>

TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> Values]

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> 0]

Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
====

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PaxosSingleDecree ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, ballot, value

TypeOK == /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: Nat]]
          /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot: Nat, value: Nat]]
          /\ chosen \in Nat

Init == /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
        /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
        /\ chosen = 0

Prepare(p) == /\ proposers[p].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot + 1
              /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

Promise(a, p) == /\ acceptors[a].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot
                /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

Accept(p, v) == /\ proposers[p].value' = v
               /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

Accepted(a, p) == /\ acceptors[a].value' = proposers[p].value
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

Chosen(v) == /\ chosen' = v
            /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, proposers>>

Next == \/ \E p \in 1..M: Prepare(p)
        \/ \E a \in 1..N : \E p \in 1..M : Promise(a, p)
        \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E v \in 1..M : Accept(p, v)
        \/ \E a \in 1..N : \E p \in 1..M : Accepted(a, p)
        \/ \E v \in 1..M: Chosen(v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, MAX_RETRIES

VARIABLES seq, ack, retries, state

TypeOK == /\ seq \in 0..N
          /\ ack \in 0..N
          /\ retries \in 0..MAX_RETRIES
          /\ state \in {"idle", "sending", "waiting_ack", "done", "failed"}

Init == /\ seq = 0
        /\ ack = 0
        /\ retries = 0
        /\ state = "idle"

SendChunk == /\ state = "idle"
             /\ seq < N
             /\ state' = "sending"

Transmit == /\ state = "sending"
           /\ state' = "waiting_ack"

AckReceived == /\ state = "waiting_ack"
              /\ ack = seq
              /\ state' = "idle"
              /\ seq' = seq + 1
              /\ retries' = 0

Retransmit == /\ state = "waiting_ack"
              /\ ack # seq
              /\ retries < MAX_RETRIES
              /\ state' = "sending"
              /\ retries' = retries + 1

GiveUp == /\ state = "waiting_ack"
          /\ retries = MAX_RETRIES
          /\ state' = "failed"

Done == /\ seq = N
        /\ state' = "done"

Next == \E s \in {"idle", "sending", "waiting_ack", "done", "failed"}:
        /\ state' = s
        /\ UNCHANGED <<ack, retries>>
        \/ SendChunk
        \/ Transmit
        \/ AckReceived
        \/ Retransmit
        \/ GiveUp
        \/ Done

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<seq, ack, retries, state>>

====

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolationDB ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N, T

VARIABLES db, txs, txState, txReadSet, txWriteSet, txSnapshot

vars == <<db, txs, txState, txReadSet, txWriteSet, txSnapshot>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ db \in [1..N -> Nat]
    /\ txs \in 1..T
    /\ txState \in [1..T -> {"idle", "active", "committed", "aborted"}]
    /\ txReadSet \in [1..T -> SUBSET 1..N]
    /\ txWriteSet \in [1..T -> [1..N -> Nat]]
    /\ txSnapshot \in [1..T -> [1..N -> Nat]]

Init ==
    /\ db = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ txs = 1..T
    /\ txState = [t \in txs |-> "idle"]
    /\ txReadSet = [t \in txs |-> {}]
    /\ txWriteSet = [t \in txs |-> [i \in 1..N |-> 0]]
    /\ txSnapshot = [t \in txs |-> [i \in 1..N |-> 0]]

BeginTx(t) ==
    /\ txState[t] = "idle"
    /\ txState' = [txState EXCEPT ![t] = "active"]
    /\ txReadSet' = [txReadSet EXCEPT ![t] = {}]
    /\ txWriteSet' = [txWriteSet EXCEPT ![t] = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]]
    /\ txSnapshot' = [txSnapshot EXCEPT ![t] = db]
    /\ UNCHANGED db

Read(t, i) ==
    /\ txState[t] = "active"
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ txReadSet' = [txReadSet EXCEPT ![t] = txReadSet[t] \cup {i}]
    /\ UNCHANGED db
    /\ UNCHANGED txState
    /\ UNCHANGED txWriteSet
    /\ UNCHANGED txSnapshot

Write(t, i, v) ==
    /\ txState[t] = "active"
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ v \in Nat
    /\ txWriteSet' = [txWriteSet EXCEPT ![t][i] = v]
    /\ UNCHANGED db
    /\ UNCHANGED txState
    /\ UNCHANGED txReadSet
    /\ UNCHANGED txSnapshot

Commit(t) ==
    /\ txState[t] = "active"
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: txWriteSet[t][i] = 0 \/ db[i] = txSnapshot[t][i]
    /\ db' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF txWriteSet[t][i] = 0 THEN db[i] ELSE txWriteSet[t][i]]
    /\ txState' = [txState EXCEPT ![t] = "committed"]
    /\ UNCHANGED txReadSet
    /\ UNCHANGED txWriteSet
    /\ UNCHANGED txSnapshot

Abort(t) ==
    /\ txState[t] = "active"
    /\ txState' = [txState EXCEPT ![t] = "aborted"]
    /\ UNCHANGED db
    /\ UNCHANGED txReadSet
    /\ UNCHANGED txWriteSet
    /\ UNCHANGED txSnapshot

Next ==
    \E t \in txs:
        \/ BeginTx(t)
        \/ Read(t, CHOOSE i \in 1..N: TRUE)
        \/ Write(t, CHOOSE i \in 1..N: TRUE, CHOOSE v \in 0..10: TRUE)
        \/ Commit(t)
        \/ Abort(t)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, epsilon

VARIABLES clocks, offsets, node

(* Type constraints *)
TypeOK == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
          /\ offsets \in [1..N -> Int]

(* Initial state: clocks start at 0, offsets at 0 *)
Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* Drift: each node's clock may drift by at most 1 per step *)
Drift == /\ \A i \in 1..N: offsets' = offsets
          /\ \A i \in 1..N: clocks' = clocks + offsets

(* Synchronisation step: nodes exchange clocks and adjust to average *)
Sync ==
  LET avg == (SUM i \in 1..N: clocks[i]) \div N IN
  /\ clocks' = [i \in 1..N |-> avg]
  /\ offsets' = offsets

(* Next-state relation: either drift or sync *)
Next == Drift \/ Sync

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

(* Invariant: after one round, all clocks within epsilon *)
RoundInvariant == /\ \A i, j \in 1..N: Abs(clocks[i] - clocks[j]) <= epsilon

====

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N = 2

VARIABLES flag, turn

TypeOK == flag \in [0..1 -> BOOLEAN] /\ turn \in 0..1

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 0..1 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 0

Next ==
  \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![0] = TRUE]
      /\ turn' = 1
      /\ UNCHANGED turn
  \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
      /\ turn' = 0
      /\ UNCHANGED turn
  \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![0] = FALSE]
      /\ UNCHANGED turn
  \/ /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
      /\ UNCHANGED turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES infected

vars == <<infected>>

TypeOK == infected \in [1..N -> 1..N]

Init == infected = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]

Next == \E i \in 1..N:
          \E j \in 1..N:
            (i # j) /\ (infected[i] # infected[j]) /\ 
            (infected' = [infected EXCEPT ![i] = infected[i] \cup infected[j], ![j] = infected[j] \cup infected[i]])

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
====

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PageAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N, Clients
ASSUME N \in Nat
ASSUME Clients \subseteq 1..N

Pages == 1..N

VARIABLE free, allocated

TypeOK == /\ free \in SUBSET Pages
          /\ allocated \in [Clients -> SUBSET Pages]

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == \/ /\ free' = free \ {p}
              /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
              /\ p \in free
          \/ /\ free' = free \cup {p}
              /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
              /\ p \in Pages \ free
              /\ c \in Clients
              /\ allocated[c] # {}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

====

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS Topics, Subscribers
VARIABLES messages, subscribed


TopicSet == Topics
SubscriberSet == Subscribers

Variables == <<subscribed, messages>>

(* subscribed[topic] is the set of subscribers interested in topic *)
(* messages[topic] is the sequence of messages published to topic *)

TypeOK == subscribed \in [TopicSet -> SUBSET SubscriberSet] /\
          messages \in [TopicSet -> Seq(Int)]

Init == /\ subscribed = [t \in TopicSet |-> {}]
        /\ messages = [t \in TopicSet |-> <<>>]

Publish(topic, msg) == 
    /\ topic \in TopicSet
    /\ msg \in Int
    /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![topic] = Append(messages[topic], msg)]
    /\ UNCHANGED subscribed

Subscribe(sub, topic) ==
    /\ sub \in SubscriberSet
    /\ topic \in TopicSet
    /\ subscribed' = [subscribed EXCEPT ![topic] = subscribed[topic] \cup {sub}]
    /\ UNCHANGED messages

Deliver(sub, topic) ==
    /\ sub \in subscribed[topic]
    /\ topic \in TopicSet
    /\ messages[topic] # <<>>
    /\ UNCHANGED subscribed
    /\ UNCHANGED messages

Next == \E sub \in SubscriberSet : \E topic \in TopicSet : \E msg \in Int :
            Publish(topic, msg)
        \/ \E sub \in SubscriberSet : \E topic \in TopicSet :
            Subscribe(sub, topic)
        \/ \E sub \in SubscriberSet : \E topic \in TopicSet :
            Deliver(sub, topic)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_Variables

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers

CONSTANTS P1, P2

VARIABLES turn, wants

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {P1, P2}
          /\ wants \in [P1 |-> BOOLEAN, P2 |-> BOOLEAN]

Init == /\ turn = P1
        /\ wants = [P1 |-> FALSE, P2 |-> FALSE]

Next ==
  \/ /\ wants[P1] = FALSE
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P1] = TRUE]
      /\ UNCHANGED turn
  \/ /\ wants[P2] = FALSE
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P2] = TRUE]
      /\ UNCHANGED turn
  \/ /\ wants[P1] = TRUE
      /\ wants[P2] = TRUE
      /\ turn = P1
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P1] = FALSE]
      /\ turn' = P2
  \/ /\ wants[P1] = TRUE
      /\ wants[P2] = TRUE
      /\ turn = P2
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P2] = FALSE]
      /\ turn' = P1
  \/ /\ wants[P1] = TRUE
      /\ wants[P2] = FALSE
      /\ turn = P1
      /\ UNCHANGED wants
      /\ UNCHANGED turn
  \/ /\ wants[P1] = FALSE
      /\ wants[P2] = TRUE
      /\ turn = P2
      /\ UNCHANGED wants
      /\ UNCHANGED turn
  \/ /\ wants[P1] = TRUE
      /\ wants[P2] = TRUE
      /\ turn = P1
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P1] = FALSE]
      /\ UNCHANGED turn
  \/ /\ wants[P1] = TRUE
      /\ wants[P2] = TRUE
      /\ turn = P2
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![P2] = FALSE]
      /\ UNCHANGED turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N, Node
VARIABLES counts


TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
          /\ \A n \in Node: \A m \in Node: counts[n][m] \in Nat

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

Increment(n) == counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][n] = @ + 1]

Merge(n, m) ==
  /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = Max(@, counts[m][m]),
                 ![m][n] = Max(@, counts[n][n])]

Next == \E n \in Node:
          \/ Increment(n)
          \/ \E m \in Node: m # n /\ Merge(n, m)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_counts

GlobalCount(n) == SUM(counts[][n])

====
